methodologies.name: formal-reasoning
methodologies.use_when: Enforcing or questioning rules, conventions, standards. 'Does this apply here?' 'Why do we do it this way?'
methodologies.prevents: Blind rule enforcement, blind rule violation, unjustified exceptions

methodologies.name: decomposition
methodologies.use_when: Breaking a complex problem into parts. 'How should I structure this?' 'What are the pieces?'
methodologies.prevents: God objects, tangled dependencies, premature abstraction without boundary analysis

methodologies.name: invariant-analysis
methodologies.use_when: Something works sometimes but not always. 'Why does this break?' 'What must stay true?' Pre/postconditions.
methodologies.prevents: 'Works sometimes' bugs, state corruption, broken assumptions in loops/recursion

methodologies.name: contradiction
methodologies.use_when: Choosing between options. 'Should we do X or Y?' Assume one is wrong, derive consequences.
methodologies.prevents: Decision paralysis, hidden assumptions in 'obvious' choices, confirmation bias

methodologies.name: abstraction-refinement
methodologies.use_when: Building something new from scratch. Start abstract, refine toward concrete. 'What's the right level of detail?'
methodologies.prevents: Premature detail, analysis paralysis, incoherent architectures

methodologies.name: empirical-falsification
methodologies.use_when: Uncertain claims or assumptions. 'Will this scale?' 'Is this actually faster?' Design the cheapest disproving experiment.
methodologies.prevents: Untested assumptions becoming load-bearing, cargo cult engineering
